mapper.select: SELECT ccl.id, ccl.course_code, ccl.college_id, col.college_name FROM edu_course_college_limit ccl LEFT JOIN edu_college col ON ccl.college_id = col.id WHERE ccl.course_code = #{courseCode}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_course_college_limit WHERE course_code = #{courseCode} AND college_id = #{collegeId}
